title: CycloneSEQ Library Construction and Sequencing Protocol Collection for Animals
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4oegc","text":"CycloneSEQ, a novel nanopore sequencing platform developed by BGI-Research, is designed to generate large-scale long-reads. This technology can be applied in diverse fields, including plant, animal, and microbial research genomics. This protocol collection focuses on CycloneSEQ library construction and sequencing for animal species.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
